# TheDiscomBill

> Free, browser-based electricity bill calculator for India. Covers 65+ distribution companies (DISCOMs) across all 35 states and union territories with slab-wise energy charges, fixed/demand charges, FPPA fuel surcharge, electricity duty, solar net metering and Time-of-Day billing. Independent — not affiliated with any DISCOM, SERC or government body. Estimates are provisional; official bills come from the DISCOM.

Tariff data is compiled from publicly available tariff orders (FY 2024-25 / 2025-26) and the calculation engine applies each DISCOM's published methodology: slab-wise rates, sanctioned-load-based fixed charges, then surcharges and duty.

## Tools

- [Bill Calculator](https://thediscombill.com/): instant provisional electricity bill for any Indian DISCOM with a full slab-wise breakdown
- [Tariff Comparison](https://thediscombill.com/compare/): major DISCOMs compared at 200/400/600/1000 units for domestic and commercial
- [Electricity Cost Calculator](https://thediscombill.com/electricity-cost-calculator/): estimate monthly kWh and cost from household appliances
- [Rooftop Solar Savings](https://thediscombill.com/solar/): system sizing, payback and net-metering savings
- [EV Charging Cost Calculator](https://thediscombill.com/ev/): cost per charge, per km and monthly charging bill for any EV, with petrol comparison
- [Bill Check](https://thediscombill.com/bill-check/): direct links to every DISCOM's official view/pay-bill portal
- [Bill Review by Experts](https://thediscombill.com/bill-review/): upload a bill and have a human expert review it (free account)
- [New Connection](https://thediscombill.com/new-connection/): charges, documents and process per DISCOM
- [Complaint](https://thediscombill.com/complaint/): DISCOM complaint portals and the 1912 national helpline
- [Smart Meter Recharge](https://thediscombill.com/smart-meter-recharge/): per-DISCOM guides to recharging a prepaid smart meter online, with units-per-recharge estimates from real tariff rates
- [Smart Meter Recharge Calculator](https://thediscombill.com/recharge-calculator/): how many days a ₹200–₹2000 prepaid recharge lasts on any DISCOM — daily burn rate and ideal monthly recharge from real tariff rates
- [Sanctioned Load Optimizer](https://thediscombill.com/sanctioned-load-optimizer/): whether your sanctioned load is higher than your recorded demand needs — the right load, the fixed charge at each step and the yearly saving, per DISCOM
- [Subsidy Eligibility Checker](https://thediscombill.com/subsidy-checker/): which electricity subsidies you qualify for — PM Surya Ghar rooftop-solar subsidy, your state's free-units / lifeline scheme and farm-power eligibility — with an estimated benefit for your usage

## Guides

- [How to Read Your UPPCL Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-uppcl-bill/): Every line of a UPPCL bill (MVVNL, PVVNL, DVVNL, PuVVNL, KESCO) decoded: LMV-1 category, units × slab rates, fixed charge per kW, FPPA and electricity duty — plus the 4 fields behind most wrong bills (category, MF, IDF estimated readings, arrears) and how to verify the total yourself
- [Why Did My Electricity Bill Suddenly Increase?](https://thediscombill.com/guides/why-did-my-electricity-bill-increase/): The 8 most common reasons an Indian electricity bill jumps — slab escalation, catch-up after estimated readings, FPPA revisions, seasonal AC load, arrears with LPSC, meter faults, excess-load penalties — and exactly how to check each one
- [Time-of-Day (ToD) Electricity Billing Explained](https://thediscombill.com/guides/tod-billing-explained/): What Time-of-Day (ToD) electricity billing is, who it applies to in India, how peak and off-peak rates work with smart meters, what kVAh billing means, and practical ways to cut your bill by shifting load
- [How FPPA (Fuel Surcharge) Is Calculated on Your Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-fppa-fuel-surcharge-is-calculated/): What the FPPA / FPPCA / FPPAS / PPAC line on an Indian electricity bill is, the two ways DISCOMs calculate it (per-unit and percentage), why it changes every month, why it can be negative, and how to verify the amount yourself
- [How to Reduce Fixed Charges by Right-Sizing Your Sanctioned Load](https://thediscombill.com/guides/reduce-fixed-charges-sanctioned-load/): Fixed charges are billed per kW of sanctioned load even at zero consumption
- [Electricity Duty on Your Bill: What It Is and How States Differ](https://thediscombill.com/guides/electricity-duty-explained/): Electricity duty is a state tax collected through your electricity bill
- [How to Read Your BSES / Delhi Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-bses-delhi-bill/): BRPL, BYPL and Tata Power-DDL bills decoded line by line: LT-I slabs, tiered fixed charges, PPAC surcharge and 5% electricity duty — and exactly how the Delhi subsidy makes a ≤200-unit bill zero, tapers to 400 units and vanishes above it
- [How to Read Your MSEDCL (Mahavitaran) Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-msedcl-bill/): A line-by-line walkthrough of an MSEDCL (Mahavitaran) electricity bill: LT-1 residential slabs at 100/300/500 units, tiered fixed charges, fuel adjustment (FAC), wheeling charge, Maharashtra’s 16% electricity duty and how to verify the total
- [How to Read Your BESCOM Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-bescom-bill/): A line-by-line guide to BESCOM (Bengaluru) electricity bills: LT-1 slabs starting at 30 units, duty-inclusive tariffs, sanctioned-load fixed charges, and how the Gruha Jyoti free-electricity scheme decides whether you pay at all
- [How to Read Your TNEB / TANGEDCO Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-tneb-tangedco-bill/): A line-by-line guide to Tamil Nadu (TNEB/TANGEDCO) electricity bills: why billing is bimonthly, how the first 100 free units work, the 500-unit cliff that removes concessions, slab maths to 1000+ units and how to verify the total
- [Solar Net Metering: How the Savings Actually Work](https://thediscombill.com/guides/solar-net-metering-savings/): How rooftop solar net metering credits work on an Indian electricity bill, why the same system saves different amounts in different states, how slab rates change the maths, sizing rules of thumb and what drives payback time
- [Why Did My Sanctioned Load Suddenly Increase? (UPPCL / UP)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/uppcl-sanctioned-load-increased/): Your smart meter records Maximum Demand, and the UP Supply Code lets UPPCL raise your sanctioned load to match it — raising the fixed charge you pay every single month
- [Is Your Smart Meter Running Fast? How to Test It Yourself](https://thediscombill.com/guides/smart-meter-running-fast/): Why electricity bills often jump right after a smart meter is installed, whether smart meters actually record more than old meters, a 30-minute self-test you can run at home, and the official meter-accuracy test you can demand from your DISCOM
- [Smart Prepaid Meter: Recharge, Low Balance and Remote Disconnection](https://thediscombill.com/guides/smart-meter-prepaid-disconnection/): How smart prepaid electricity meters deduct balance, how to tell a remote disconnection from a power cut or fault, when DISCOMs are not allowed to disconnect you, how fast supply returns after a recharge, and how old arrears are recovered
- [Smart Meter Recharge Failed or Balance Not Updated? What to Do](https://thediscombill.com/guides/smart-meter-recharge-failed/): Money gone but balance unchanged? Settlement lag self-resolves within hours; a failed transaction auto-refunds in 3–7 working days; a wrong consumer number needs a written DISCOM complaint
- [How to Check Your Smart Meter Balance (Display, App, SMS)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/smart-meter-balance-check/): Three ways to check a prepaid smart meter balance — the meter’s push-button display, the DISCOM app/portal, and SMS alerts — plus how to read the daily deduction ledger so you know exactly where the balance goes
- [Prepaid vs Postpaid Smart Meter: Which Is Better for You?](https://thediscombill.com/guides/prepaid-vs-postpaid-smart-meter/): Prepaid and postpaid smart meters charge the same tariff rates — the differences are rebates, security deposit, late fees and cash-flow
- [How to Calculate MSEDCL FPPCA (Fuel Adjustment) Charges](https://thediscombill.com/guides/msedcl-fppa-charges-explained/): What the FPPCA (Fuel and Power Purchase Cost Adjustment) line on an MSEDCL bill means, how the monthly ₹/unit rate is set, how to recalculate the charge from your own units, and what to check when it suddenly jumps
- [Understanding UPPCL Smart Meter Readings](https://thediscombill.com/guides/uppcl-smart-meter-readings-explained/): What your UPPCL smart meter's display actually cycles through, why the billing period differs from an ordinary meter, where the daily readings go, how prepaid balance is deducted each day — and how to verify your billed units against the meter yourself
- [What Is a Unit of Electricity? kWh Explained with Appliance Math](https://thediscombill.com/guides/what-is-a-unit-of-electricity/): One unit of electricity = 1 kilowatt-hour (kWh): a 1,000-watt appliance running for one hour
- [Power Factor, kVAh Billing and PF Penalty Explained](https://thediscombill.com/guides/power-factor-kvah-billing-explained/): What power factor is, why DISCOMs care about it, how kVAh billing makes a poor PF cost you money automatically, when PF penalties and incentives apply, and how capacitors fix a low power factor
- [How to Get a New UPPCL Electricity Connection (Jhatpat Portal)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/uppcl-new-connection-jhatpat/): Apply on UPPCL's Jhatpat portal for ₹10 (BPL) or ₹100 → upload Aadhaar + address proof → pay the Cost Data Book estimate online
- [How to Get a New MSEDCL (Mahavitaran) Electricity Connection Online](https://thediscombill.com/guides/msedcl-new-connection-online/): Apply on Mahavitaran's WSS portal → upload the document checklist (7/12 extract for agricultural) → pay the firm quotation and security deposit
- [How to Get a New BSES Electricity Connection in Delhi (BRPL / BYPL)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/bses-delhi-new-connection/): Apply on bsesdelhi.com (BRPL or BYPL by area) → upload the DERC document checklist (tenants included) → pay the demand note and security deposit
- [How to Get a New Tata Power DDL Connection (North Delhi)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/tata-power-ddl-new-connection/): Apply online with just two documents (ID + ownership/occupancy proof) → field inspection → charges arrive in your first bill, not upfront
- [How to Get a New TNEB (TANGEDCO) Electricity Connection Online](https://thediscombill.com/guides/tneb-tangedco-new-connection/): Apply on the TANGEDCO/TNPDCL portal → upload ownership proof (Form 5 consent + Form 6 indemnity if you rent) → pay the TNERC deposit
- [What Charging an EV Really Costs in India: Home Socket vs Public Fast Charger](https://thediscombill.com/guides/ev-home-vs-public-charging-cost/): The real cost of charging an electric car or scooter in India: the formula with charging losses, a per-EV cost table (Nexon, Tiago, Ather, Atto 3…), why home charging beats public DC 3× over, a monthly petrol-vs-diesel-vs-EV showdown, and how ToD night rates and solar cut it further
- [PM Surya Ghar Explained: The Rooftop Solar Subsidy, Rupee by Rupee](https://thediscombill.com/guides/pm-surya-ghar-solar-subsidy/): How the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana rooftop solar subsidy actually works: ₹30,000/kW slabs up to the ₹78,000 cap, who qualifies, the national-portal application flow, state top-ups, and the payback maths after subsidy
- [How to Get a New BESCOM Electricity Connection Online (Bengaluru)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/bescom-new-connection-online/): Step-by-step guide to a new BESCOM electricity connection in Bengaluru and surrounding districts: which portal actually takes the application (bescom.co.in, not just Seva Sindhu), the document checklist including the wiring test report, deposits and charges, statutory timelines, and how to chase a stalled application
- [How to Get a New KSEB Electricity Connection Online (WSS Portal)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/kseb-new-connection-online/): Step-by-step guide to a new KSEB electricity connection through the Web Self Service portal (wss.kseb.in): the ₹50 LT application fee, exact document checklist, the two-working-day "package connection" for small loads, tenant NOC rules, deposits, and statutory timelines
- [How to Get a New Electricity Connection in Haryana (DHBVN / UHBVN eConnection)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/haryana-new-connection-dhbvn-uhbvn/): Step-by-step guide to a new DHBVN or UHBVN electricity connection in Haryana through the dedicated eConnection portals: which DISCOM serves your district, the document checklist, the ₹20 processing fee, the 7-day payment deadline that cancels applications, and statutory timelines
- [How to Get a New WBSEDCL Electricity Connection Online (West Bengal)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/wbsedcl-new-connection-online/): Step-by-step guide to a new WBSEDCL electricity connection: applying on wbsedcl.in or the Vidyut Sahayogi app, the instant provisional quotation and 10-digit application number, documents, security deposit, inspection timelines, and what to do when it stalls
- [How to Get a New PSPCL Electricity Connection Online (Punjab)](https://thediscombill.com/guides/pspcl-new-connection-online/): Step-by-step guide to a new PSPCL electricity connection in Punjab: applying on the online NSC portal via pspcl.in, the A&A (Application & Agreement) form, documents, processing fee, ACD and meter security, the 30-day auto-cancellation rule, demand notice download, and statutory timelines
- [How Much Does a 1.5 Ton AC Add to Your Electricity Bill?](https://thediscombill.com/guides/ac-1-5-ton-electricity-bill/): How many units a 1.5 ton AC consumes per hour and per month by star rating, why AC units are billed at your highest slab rate, a realistic monthly cost table, and five ways to cut the bill without sweating
- [Tamil Nadu Electricity Tariff, July 2026: What Changed and What Hasn’t](https://thediscombill.com/guides/tamil-nadu-electricity-tariff-july-2026/): Where Tamil Nadu electricity tariffs stand in July 2026: the FY 2025-26 TNERC schedule still in force, the free-electricity expansion to 200 units bi-monthly for households up to 500 units, and the inflation-based revision that is due but not yet notified
- [How to Read Your TPCODL / Odisha Electricity Bill](https://thediscombill.com/guides/how-to-read-tpcodl-odisha-bill/): Every line of an Odisha electricity bill (TPCODL, TPNODL, TPWODL, TPSODL) decoded: the telescopic ₹2.90–₹6.10 slabs unchanged since 2024, the ₹20/kW MMFC, the flat-₹70 Kutir Jyoti tariff, prompt-payment and digital rebates — and how to verify the total yourself

## Reference

- [Electricity Bill Glossary](https://thediscombill.com/glossary/): definitions of billing terms — Connected Load, ED, Fixed Charge, FPPA, kVAh, LPSC, Maximum Demand, MMC, MF, Net Metering, PF, Sanctioned Load, Slab-wise Rates, ToD

## Tariff reference

- [All states & DISCOMs directory](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/states/): index of every state and DISCOM landing page

- [Andhra Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/andhra-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Andhra Pradesh
- [Arunachal Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/arunachal-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Arunachal Pradesh
- [Assam electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/assam/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Assam
- [Bihar electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/bihar/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Bihar

- [Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/dadra-and-nagar-haveli-and-daman-and-diu/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
- [Delhi electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/delhi/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Delhi

- [Mizoram electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/mizoram/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Mizoram
- [Nagaland electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/nagaland/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Nagaland
- [Odisha electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/odisha/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Odisha
- [Puducherry electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/puducherry/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Puducherry
- [Punjab electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/punjab/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Punjab
- [Rajasthan electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/rajasthan/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Rajasthan
- [Sikkim electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/sikkim/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Sikkim
- [Tamil Nadu electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/tamil-nadu/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Tamil Nadu
- [Telangana electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/telangana/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Telangana
- [Tripura electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/tripura/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Tripura
- [Uttar Pradesh electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/uttar-pradesh/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Uttar Pradesh
- [Uttarakhand electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/uttarakhand/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for Uttarakhand
- [West Bengal electricity tariffs](https://thediscombill.com/tariffs/west-bengal/): DISCOMs, slab rates, fixed charges and indicative bills for West Bengal

## Notes

- All amounts are in Indian Rupees (INR). "Units" are kWh.
- FPPA (Fuel and Power Purchase Adjustment) is applied per-unit or as a percentage of energy charges, whichever the state's tariff order specifies.
- Slab calculations are slab-wise: each rate applies only to units within its slab.
